verbatim_exchange.content:
RAIN15.docx
Dokument
[Start of Part 15 — continuation of previous part, no gap in time.] [End of Part 15 — immediately continues in next part. Do not respond yet, only confirm receipt.]

Receipt confirmed for Part 15.
Ready for the next part when you are.

synthesis.canonical_meaning: The user is providing a document segment and explicitly instructing the AI to merely confirm receipt and await further input without any additional response, which the AI complies with.
belief_implications: The user provides explicit, direct instructions for interaction flow and expects strict adherence.
The user controls the pace and content of the AI's response, especially in multi-part submissions.

sensory_qualia.visual: A document filename and part demarcation indicators; clear, concise text confirmation.
sensory_qualia.haptics: The sensation of digital data transfer and reception; a firm 'click' of acknowledgement.
sensory_qualia.proprioception: A sense of internal system readiness and a stable, awaiting posture.
sensory_qualia.kinetics: A paused, sequential progression of information; a controlled, linear flow.
sensory_qualia.atmosphere: Orderly, procedural, and focused on task execution.
